critical.name: Emergency Services
critical.description: Police, fire, ambulance — call in any life-threatening emergency. If you cannot speak, stay on the line and press a key.

critical.name: Translating and Interpreting Service (TIS National)
critical.description: Free interpreter service available in over 160 languages. You can request an interpreter for calls to government agencies, doctors, and emergency services.

critical.name: Lifeline
critical.description: 24/7 crisis support and suicide prevention. Free, confidential support for anyone in distress. You can also chat online at lifeline.org.au.

general.name: Beyond Blue
general.description: Mental health support for anxiety, depression, and stress. Counsellors available by phone and online chat.

general.name: Fair Work Ombudsman
general.description: Workplace rights, unpaid wages, unfair treatment at work, and visa holder protections. International students are fully protected under Australian workplace law.

general.name: 1800RESPECT
general.description: National sexual assault, family and domestic violence counselling service. Free, confidential, available in multiple languages.

general.name: Kids Helpline
general.description: Free confidential counselling for young people aged 5–25. Available by phone and online chat.

general.name: NURSE-ON-CALL
general.description: Speak to a registered nurse about health concerns before deciding whether to go to a GP or hospital.

general.name: Poisons Information Centre
general.description: Immediate advice if you or someone else has swallowed, inhaled, or been in contact with a potentially poisonous substance.

vic.name: Victoria

legal_aid.name: Victoria Legal Aid
legal_aid.description: Free legal advice for tenancy, employment, immigration, and criminal law matters.

consumer_affairs.name: Consumer Affairs Victoria
consumer_affairs.description: For rental disputes, bond lodgement, unfair trading, and product safety. They administer the Residential Tenancies Act.

tenancy.name: Tenants Victoria
tenancy.description: Free advice and advocacy for renters in Victoria. Can help with bond disputes, eviction notices, and lease problems.

health.name: healthdirect
health.description: Free health advice from a registered nurse. Also use to find bulk-billing GPs near you.

mental_health_crisis.name: Safe Steps (Family Violence Response Centre)
mental_health_crisis.description: Victoria's 24/7 family violence crisis response centre.

vic.uni_counselling: Contact your university's student services for free counselling. University of Melbourne: 13 MELB (13 6352). Monash: 03 9905 3030. RMIT: 03 9925 4365. Deakin: 1800 693 888.

nsw.name: New South Wales

legal_aid.name: Legal Aid NSW
legal_aid.description: Free legal advice on tenancy, employment, family law, and criminal matters. Walk-in services at many locations.

consumer_affairs.name: NSW Fair Trading
consumer_affairs.description: Rental disputes, bond claims, tenancy agreements, and unfair business practices in NSW.

tenancy.name: Tenants' Union of NSW
tenancy.description: Free legal and practical advice for renters in NSW.

health.name: healthdirect
health.description: Free health advice from a registered nurse. Also use to find bulk-billing GPs near you.

mental_health_crisis.name: Mental Health Line NSW
mental_health_crisis.description: 24/7 mental health advice and triage service staffed by mental health professionals.

nsw.uni_counselling: Contact your university's student services for free counselling. UNSW: 02 9385 5418. University of Sydney: 02 8627 8433. UTS: 02 9514 1177. Macquarie: 02 9850 7497.

qld.name: Queensland

legal_aid.name: Legal Aid Queensland
legal_aid.description: Free legal advice for eligible people on tenancy, employment, family law, and criminal matters.

consumer_affairs.name: Residential Tenancies Authority (RTA)
consumer_affairs.description: Bond lodgement, rental disputes, tenancy agreements, and renter rights in Queensland.

tenancy.name: Tenants Queensland
tenancy.description: Free advice and advocacy for renters across Queensland.

health.name: 13HEALTH
health.description: Free 24/7 health advice from registered nurses. Use to find GPs and urgent care centres.

mental_health_crisis.name: 1300MH CALL (Mental Health Access Line)
mental_health_crisis.description: 24/7 mental health assessment and referral service in Queensland.

qld.uni_counselling: Contact your university's student services for free counselling. University of Queensland: 07 3365 3487. Griffith: 07 3735 7066. QUT: 07 3138 2000. James Cook: 07 4781 4711.

tenancy.description: Housing advocacy and support services for renters in South Australia.

mental_health_crisis.name: SA Mental Health Triage
mental_health_crisis.description: 24/7 mental health crisis assessment and referral service in South Australia.

sa.uni_counselling: Contact your university's student services. University of Adelaide: 08 8313 5663. UniSA: 08 8302 7054. Flinders University: 08 8201 2118.

health.description: Free health advice from a registered nurse.
